allow: PowerShell(\(Get-ChildItem "C:\\site-TEA\\frames"\).Count; Get-ChildItem "C:\\site-TEA\\frames" | Select-Object -First 3 | Select-Object Name, Length)

PowerShell($c = Get-Content 'C:\\site-TEA\\index.html' -Raw; $bodyStart = $c.IndexOf\('<body>'\); $bodyEnd = $c.IndexOf\('</body>'\); Write-Output "body tag at char: $bodyStart"; Write-Output "body close at char: $bodyEnd"; Write-Output "total chars: $\($c.Length\)")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\site-TEA\\entrevistas\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(-not \(Test-Path "C:\\site-TEA\\entrevistas"\)\) { Write-Output "FOLDER NOT FOUND" }2)
